summary: Utility dialect that renders an existing task's form view to a PNG thumbnail and uploads it. Not a content-authoring target.
in_scope: Rendering the form view of a given task (`task` + `lang`) to an image
Cropping the capture to a fixed aspect (top crop) or an explicit { x, y, width, height }
Uploading the PNG to an item-derived Storage path and returning its public URL
Returning the PNG as base64 alongside the URL
out_of_scope: Authoring any domain content (assessments, spreadsheets, charts, diagrams, boards, data) — L0013 only photographs another task's output
Editing or recompiling the target task — it is rendered read-only
Interactive UI — the output is a static image
Cross-language composition — L0013 takes a task reference, it does not import another dialect's functions
